PricingPage.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more
PricingPage.free_desc: Essential learning tools to get started
PricingPage.faq_a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
PricingPage.faq_q2: What happens to my data if I cancel?
PricingPage.faq_a2: Your data is preserved for 30 days after cancellation. You can reactivate anytime.
PricingPage.faq_q3: Is there a free trial for Premium?
PricingPage.faq_a3: Yes, new users get a 14-day free trial of all Premium features.
PricingPage.faq_a4: University pricing depends on the number of users and required features. Contact us for a custom quote.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.description: Get in touch with the right team for your needs
ContactPage.dpo_desc: Privacy, data rights, and GDPR inquiries

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.controller_text: The data controller is StudiQ sp. z o.o., based in Warsaw, Poland. You can contact us at dpo@studiq.pl for any privacy-related matters.
PrivacyPage.data_text: We collect personal data you provide when creating an account (name, email address) and data generated through your use of the platform (quiz results, flashcard practice history, created content). We do not collect data from third-party sources.
PrivacyPage.purpose_text: Your data is processed to provide the StudiQ platform services, including account management, quiz and flashcard functionality, and platform improvement. We do not use your data for advertising or profiling.
PrivacyPage.legal_text: Data processing is based on the performance of the service agreement (Article 6(1)(b) GDPR) and your consent where applicable (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR).
PrivacyPage.rights_text: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing of, and port your personal data. You may also withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact our DPO at dpo@studiq.pl.
PrivacyPage.retention_text: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, your personal data is erased within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.
PrivacyPage.cookies_text: StudiQ uses only mandatory technical cookies necessary for the platform to function. These include session management and authentication cookies. We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or any third-party cookies.
PrivacyPage.contact_text: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@studiq.pl or +48 123 567 891.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.general_text: These Terms of Service govern the use of the StudiQ platform operated by StudiQ sp. z o.o. By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to these terms.
TermsPage.accounts_text: You must provide accurate information when registering. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. Accounts may not be shared between users. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
TermsPage.services_text: StudiQ provides an educational platform for creating and practicing with questions, flashcards, and quizzes. Features available depend on your subscription tier (free, premium, or university plan).
TermsPage.content_text: You retain ownership of content you create on the platform. By creating content, you grant StudiQ a license to store and display it within the platform. You are responsible for ensuring your content does not violate any laws or third-party rights.
TermsPage.payments_text: Premium subscriptions are billed on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time, and access continues until the end of the billing period. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.
TermsPage.liability_text: StudiQ is provided 'as is' without warranties. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service. To the maximum extent permitted by law, StudiQ is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
TermsPage.cookies_text: StudiQ uses mandatory technical cookies that are essential for the platform to function properly. These cookies are used for:
TermsPage.cookies_item1: Session management — keeping you logged in during your visit
TermsPage.cookies_item2: Authentication — verifying your identity when accessing protected features
TermsPage.changes_text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. We will notify users of significant changes via email or platform notification.
TermsPage.contact_text: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@studiq.pl or +48 123 567 893.

AiChatPage.title: AI Assistant
AiChatPage.subtitle: Chat with AI to create flashcards, summaries, quizzes, and more
AiChatPage.greeting_suffix: How can I help you study?
AiChatPage.empty_state_hint: Ask AI to help you study, create flashcards, summarize text, or explain concepts
AiChatPage.cta_response_study: I'd be happy to help! What subject or topic are you working on?
AiChatPage.cta_response_flashcards: Great! What topic should the flashcards be about? You can describe the material or upload a file.
AiChatPage.cta_response_summarize: Sure! Paste your notes or upload a file and I'll summarize them for you.
AiChatPage.cta_response_explain: What concept would you like me to explain?
AiChatPage.cta_response_default: How can I help you study?
AiChatPage.disclaimer: Artificial Inteligence can make mistakes. Always verify important information.
